title: ffi/client.rs: decode_payload_text silently replaces all ClearMessage types except Chat — DMs display as '(binary payload)'
description: decode_payload_text() in ffi/client.rs only returns the text field if the message is ClearMessage::Chat. Any other ClearMessage variant (Payment, Profile, Ack, FileHeader, etc.) falls through to String::from_utf8 which will typically return '(binary payload)' since the inner JSON starts with a variant tag. This means whisper DMs that carry ClearMessage::Chat will display correctly, but broadcast ClearMessage::Payment or ClearMessage::Profile events will show as binary garbage instead of being mapped to appropriate NieEvent variants. The map_notification function handles only DELIVER and WHISPER_DELIVER via decode_payload_text — there is no separate handling for non-Chat payload types.
